aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright fetch instrumentation plus assistant UI elapsed time

expertAssessments.rationale: The previously failing RAG/Web representative query now renders a readable grounded answer and no raw tool-call JSON in the latest response.
The response correctly identifies the repo-local OpenManager OTel SSOT paths rather than non-repo runtime paths.
The user-facing stream no longer exposes repeated internal tool-call JSON for searchKnowledgeBase/searchWeb.
GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel production version, Cloud Run AI Engine health, and usage guard were all checked.
The production closure is backed by a deterministic unit regression for semicolon-separated raw tool-call JSON and a Playwright production recheck.
The grounded answer included the expected OTel data source and loader/provider file paths.
